19.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

19.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
19.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
19.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

20.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
20.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
20.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

20.gl: properly, a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially, especially a sentence or formal decree (human or (participant's) divine law, individual or collective), including the act, the place, the suit, the cr
20.kj: [phrase] adversary, ceremony, charge, [idiom] crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of)

20.gl: to kindle, i.e. consume (by fire or by eating);  to be(-come) brutish
20.kj: be brutish, bring (put, take) away, burn, (cause to) eat (up), feed, heat, kindle, set (on fire), waste.
20.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H1198 (בַּעַר)

20.gl: a lamp (i.e. the burner) or light (literally or figuratively)
20.dv: or נִר; also נֵיר; or נֵר; or (feminine) נֵרָה; from a primitive root (see H5214 (נִיר); H5135 (נוּר)) properly, meaning to glisten;

20.gl: to shut up; figuratively, to surrender
20.kj: close up, deliver (up), give over (up), inclose, [idiom] pure, repair, shut (in, self, out, up, up together), stop, [idiom] straitly.

20.gl: gold, figuratively, something gold-colored (i.e. yellow), as oil, a clear sky
20.dv: from an unused root meaning to shimmer;

21.gl: a lamp (i.e. the burner) or light (literally or figuratively)
21.dv: or נִר; also נֵיר; or נֵר; or (feminine) נֵרָה; from a primitive root (see H5214 (נִיר); H5135 (נוּר)) properly, meaning to glisten;

21.gl: gold, figuratively, something gold-colored (i.e. yellow), as oil, a clear sky
21.dv: from an unused root meaning to shimmer;

21.gl: a calyx (natural or artificial); generally, bloom

22.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
22.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

22.gl: the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power
22.kj: branch, [phrase] foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon.

22.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
22.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

22.gl: to shut up; figuratively, to surrender
22.kj: close up, deliver (up), give over (up), inclose, [idiom] pure, repair, shut (in, self, out, up, up together), stop, [idiom] straitly.

22.gl: gold, figuratively, something gold-colored (i.e. yellow), as oil, a clear sky
22.dv: from an unused root meaning to shimmer;

22.gl: an opening (literally), i.e. door (gate) or entrance way
22.kj: door, entering (in), entrance (-ry), gate, opening, place.
